prompts.title: Young Man on Japanese Bicycle
prompts.prompt: A portrait of a young man with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. He is seated on a sleek modern Japanese bicycle while holding a contemporary iPhone. He is wearing a stylish gray and black Peshawari Kameez (Shalwar) with intricate detailing around the collar and cuffs. The background shows a vibrant Japanese urban street with soft daylight and subtle bokeh suggesting a bustling city environment. Realistic style with cinematic quality, sharp focus on the subject and slightly blurred background.

prompts.title: Man Hugging Goat in Winter
prompts.prompt: A heartwarming portrait of a young man with a fair complexion, dark brown eyes, and short dark hair styled neatly with a light beard and mustache. He gently hugs a small fluffy goat while a majestic German Shepherd dog curiously sniffs the goat with visible breath in the cold air. The scene is set in a serene winter landscape covered with fresh snow and falling snowflakes. Snow-covered evergreen trees and distant hills appear in the background. Soft diffused natural lighting, cinematic color grading, 85mm lens look with f/1.8 aperture creating beautiful bokeh. High dynamic range, film still quality, dramatic yet peaceful mood.

prompts.title: Boy Performing Tawaf Near Kaaba
prompts.prompt: Photorealistic 4:3 selfie of a young boy maintaining his exact facial features with dark almond-shaped eyes and a neutral expression. He is performing Tawaf in Masjid al-Haram in Mecca standing very close to the Kaaba while wearing traditional white Ihram clothing with natural fabric folds. The iconic golden door of the Kaaba is visible behind him. The scene includes a diverse crowd of pilgrims wearing white garments creating an authentic spiritual atmosphere. Bright natural daylight, soft shadows on the marble floor and black Kiswah of the Kaaba, clear blue sky, highly detailed mosque architecture, cinematic lighting and sharp focus on the boy’s face.

prompts.title: Supplication at the Mataf
prompts.prompt: A cinematic portrait of a young boy with a fair complexion and dark almond-shaped eyes, with his hands raised in sincere Dua (supplication ) while facing the Kaaba. He has a peaceful and focused expression, maintaining exact facial features from the reference photo. He is dressed in a crisp white Ihram. The background features the black Kiswah of the Kaaba and the golden calligraphy under the warm glow of the setting sun (golden hour). Soft bokeh effect on the background crowd, sharp focus on the boy's face and hands. Realistic skin textures and subsurface scattering.

prompts.title: Resting at the Prophet's Mosque
prompts.prompt: A hyper-realistic image of a young boy with a fair complexion and short dark hair sitting on the ornate red and green carpets of Al-Masjid an-Nabawi in Medina. He is wearing a clean white thobe and a small white prayer cap (kufi ). His facial features, especially his dark eyes and neutral expression, are identical to the reference photo. In the background, the iconic giant white umbrellas and the green dome of the Prophet's Mosque are visible through the arches. Soft, diffused indoor lighting, sharp focus on the subject, peaceful and serene atmosphere.

prompts.title: Reading Quran in the Mosque
prompts.prompt: A close-up, high-detail photo of a young boy with a fair complexion and dark eyes, sitting cross-legged and reading from a large, open Quran on a wooden book stand (rehal ). He is wearing a traditional white thobe. His facial features are captured with 1:1 precision from the reference photo. The scene is set inside a beautifully decorated mosque with intricate Islamic geometric patterns and marble pillars. Natural light from a high window illuminates the pages and the boy's face. Shallow depth of field, 8k resolution, authentic and calm religious setting.
